form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (18.66) over 320m at this track. Has the inside draw and is worth plenty of thought.

formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (18.66) over 320m at this track. Has the inside draw and is worth plenty of thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Became awkward in action over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 7 lengths (30.50) behind Tarawi Banjo in a Grade 5 on April 2. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 7 lengths (30.50) behind Tarawi Banjo in a Grade 5 on April 2. Should be right in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together, ran wide and lost substantial momentum.
Midway down the home straight drew attention and raced inside.
Heels galloped on entering the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (18.60) over 320m at Wagga. Tends to go fairly well off the draw and is worth plenty of thought.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (18.60) over 320m at Wagga. Tends to go fairly well off the draw and is worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but prior to that was in the money twice in a row including a narrow loss at big odds two back when second (18.40) over 320m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need to find best.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but prior to that was in the money twice in a row including a narrow loss at big odds two back when second (18.40) over 320m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need to find best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight and ran wide.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (23.31) over 401m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.comment: Finished third last time (23.31) over 401m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Back from a three-and-a-half months spell and last resumed over 320m at this track where she was in the placings, finishing third. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Back from a three-and-a-half months spell and last resumed over 320m at this track where she was in the placings, finishing third. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.90) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing eighth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and five places from 13 starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (18.90) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing eighth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and five places from 13 starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together several times in the run to the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and gave a sight after a fast early split but could manage only the minor money, finishing a 0.8 lengths second (19.52) over 340m at Bulli. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on March 31 over 388m at Gosford behind Tilly The Filly beaten 8 lengths (23.56) in a Mix 3/4. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.
